test.notes: Full suite exited with only the 2 known pre-existing failures documented in AGENTS.md: aiOrchestratorService single-lane integration closing strategy and orchestratorService unified-attempt laneId handling. No additional failures were observed (1125 passed, 2 failed).

lint.notes: Lint is not configured in the project manifest.

blockingIssues.description: VAL-ARCH-008 remains unmet on re-review. `MissionsPage.tsx` still subscribes to broad `runGraph` and `selectedMission` objects instead of minimal derived slices, so unrelated mission/run-graph updates can still rerender the page shell.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require workers to record agent-browser startup/interaction evidence explicitly in handoffs, and mark missing browser validation as a procedure deviation instead of allowing `followedProcedure: true` with only test/typecheck/grep verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This mismatch was observed in both the original `missions-store-and-decomposition` review and the re-review of `fix-ui-arch-scrutiny-gaps`: the ui-worker skill requires reading `.factory/library/user-testing.md` plus agent-browser verification, but the worker transcript skeletons/handoffs lacked those steps while still marking `followedProcedure: true`.
